summary: Implemented the Play Guide page (US-017). Created PlayGuide component with all required sections (Structure at a Glance, Three Ways to Play with 3 subsections, Rituals, Pairing References, Flavour Text), tier indicators with text labels and color, responsive CSS module styling, and semantic heading hierarchy (h1→h2→h3). Added lightweight pathname-based client-side routing in App.tsx with popstate/pushState handling. Added SPA fallback plugin to vite.config.ts for the preview server. All 97 unit tests, typecheck, and 26 E2E tests pass.
